This mod has been archived due to it getting replaced in the future.

# Create: Crate Stuff
**NOTICE: THIS MOD REQUIRES Create: Broken Bad, WHICH IS NOT ON MODRINTH.**
  ---
Crate Stuff provides more storage blocks for products in the Broken Bad mod, and will provide more features in the future, such as product cupcakes.

## Features:
- Metal Crate
- Metal Crate with Product (both colors)
- Compressed Product Brick (both colors)
- Compressed Product Brick Blocks (both colors)
- Ephedra Bale

[![Create: Crate Stuff](https://modfolio.creeperkatze.de/modrinth/project/crate-stuff?maxVersions=1&relativeTime=false&showBorder=false&animations=false&color=80ffff)](https://modrinth.com/mod/crate-stuff)
